login.title: Admin Sign In
login.subtitle: Sign in with your admin credentials.
login.locked: Too many failed attempts. Try again later.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage user accounts.
users.impersonate_confirm: Enter your password to impersonate this user

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Manage the provider catalog.
providers.conflictExists: This provider already exists in this category.
providers.optimisticLock: This provider was modified by another admin while you were editing. Refresh and re-apply your changes.

team.title: Admin Team
team.subtitle: Manage admin accounts and their roles.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Data source health, AI generation metrics, recommendation quality, and area preferences.

health.title: Data source health
health.caption: Integration outcomes per source — last {days} days.
health.empty: No integration telemetry in the window yet.

ai.title: AI metrics
ai.caption: Briefing outcomes per day — last {days} days.
ai.empty: No briefing activity in the window yet.

reco.title: Recommendation quality
reco.caption: User feedback on provider recommendations — last {days} days.
reco.empty: No recommendation feedback in the window yet.

area.title: Area preferences
area.caption: Top providers per state and category from active services. Cohorts under {floor} distinct users are hidden (k-anonymity).
area.empty: No state-and-category cohort has reached {floor} distinct users yet.

sponsored.title: Sponsored Placements
sponsored.subtitle: Labeled ad slots on directory surfaces — movers list and provider catalog.
sponsored.policyBanner: Sponsored placements render in a separate labeled slot, never inside organic rankings. SPONSORED_ENABLED runtime flag must be on; FTC clear-and-conspicuous labeling is mandatory.

flag.onHint: Live placements render publicly within their date windows.
flag.offHint: placements will not render — enable SPONSORED_ENABLED in Runtime Config.

table.title: Placements
table.caption: Impressions and clicks are fire-and-forget counters bumped by the public surface — read-only here.
table.label: Label

empty.title: No sponsored placements
empty.description: Create a placement to reserve the labeled slot on a directory surface. Nothing renders publicly until SPONSORED_ENABLED is on.

drawer.subtitle: One labeled slot per surface. The disclosure label always renders with the card.
drawer.moverSearchPlaceholder: Search movers by USDOT number or name…
drawer.noResults: No matches. Targets must be active and eligible.
drawer.notEligible: This target does not meet the eligibility gate and cannot be sponsored.
drawer.windowRequired: Set both a start and an end date.
drawer.label: Disclosure label
drawer.labelHint: Shown on the public card. FTC requires clear and conspicuous labeling — it cannot be blank.
drawer.activeHint: Active placements render only inside their date window and only while the SPONSORED_ENABLED flag is on.

stepUp.createDescription: Creating a placement publishes paid ad inventory to a public directory surface once the flag is on. Enter your admin password and MFA code or backup code to confirm.
stepUp.saveDescription: Saving rewrites live ad inventory, including its disclosure label and scope. Enter your admin password and MFA code or backup code to confirm.
stepUp.activateDescription: Activating the placement for "{name}" publishes it to its labeled public slot within its date window. Enter your admin password and MFA code or backup code to confirm.
stepUp.deactivateDescription: Deactivating the placement for "{name}" removes it from its public slot. Enter your admin password and MFA code or backup code to confirm.
stepUp.deleteDescription: The placement for "{name}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone. Enter your admin password and MFA code or backup code to confirm.

toast.hasTraffic: Cannot delete a placement with recorded impressions or clicks — deactivate it instead.

movers.title: Licensed Movers
movers.subtitle: FMCSA household-goods carrier catalog — rows are filled by the ETL; only corrections are editable here.
movers.etlNote: Catalog is filled by scripts/etl-fmcsa-movers.mjs — download the FMCSA census CSV and run it; see script header. Bulk complaint counts are not public (NCCDB), so complaintCount2y stays 0 unless corrected per row from protectyourmove.gov.

freshness.staleHint: The newest snapshot is older than 90 days — download a fresh FMCSA census CSV and rerun the ETL.

table.title: Movers
table.caption: Identity fields come from the FMCSA census snapshot and are read-only here — only the activation switch and verified corrections are editable.
table.name: Carrier

empty.title: The mover catalog is empty
empty.description: Catalog is filled by scripts/etl-fmcsa-movers.mjs — download the FMCSA census CSV and run it; see script header.
empty.filteredDescription: The catalog has rows — they are just filtered out. Adjust or clear the filters.

drawer.title: Edit mover
drawer.subtitle: FMCSA identity fields are read-only — rerun the ETL to refresh them. Only activation and verified corrections are editable.
drawer.activeHint: Inactive movers stay in the catalog (links never 404) but stop rendering on public surfaces.
drawer.complaintHint: The NCCDB has no public bulk feed, so the ETL leaves this at 0 — only enter a count you verified on protectyourmove.gov.
drawer.invalidComplaints: Complaint count must be a whole number of 0 or more.

stepUp.saveDescription: Saving rewrites the public record for "{name}" — the complaint count and safety rating render on public mover surfaces. Enter your admin password and MFA code or backup code to confirm.
stepUp.activateDescription: Activating "{name}" returns it to public mover surfaces. Enter your admin password and MFA code or backup code to confirm.
stepUp.deactivateDescription: Deactivating "{name}" removes it from public mover surfaces (the row is kept so links never 404). Enter your admin password and MFA code or backup code to confirm.
